questionHtml: Using the graph, determine the buoyancy force acting on a sphere when the ethanol is at a temperature of 25 °C.
markschemeHtml:
density = 785 «kgm−3»

« 4 3 π ( 0.03 ) 3 × 785 × 9.8 =» 0.87 «N»

Accept answer in the range 784 to 786
